description_long: This helmet features a sleek, matte black exterior with a smooth, rounded dome and broad shoulder coverage, giving it a modern, tactical appearance. The front is adorned with a pair of reflective, amber-tinted wraparound goggles that are integrated into the helmet's design. Covering the lower face and neck is a dark, textured fabric gaiter or balaclava, which is decorated with a menacing, stylized mouth graphic featuring sharp teeth and red accents. The helmet lacks visible ventilation openings or external attachments, emphasizing a streamlined silhouette. The rear and sides are unadorned, with the fabric neck covering extending fully around the base. The overall design suggests a blend of urban utility and intimidating visual flair, suitable for scenarios requiring both protection and anonymity.
description: A matte black helmet with integrated amber goggles and a dark fabric gaiter featuring a fierce teeth graphic, offering full head and neck coverage. The design is sleek, modern, and visually striking.
description_view_0: Front view shows the amber goggles and the aggressive teeth graphic on the fabric gaiter covering the lower face.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the smooth, rounded helmet profile and the way the fabric gaiter wraps around the face and neck.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the unadorned back of the helmet and the full coverage of the fabric gaiter around the neck.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the helmet's curvature and the continuation of the graphic on the gaiter.
attribute_graphic_design: The helmet features a stylized, aggressive teeth and mouth graphic in red and white on the dark fabric gaiter, contrasting with the otherwise solid matte black and gray surfaces.
